title: Wholesome Moroccan Coconut Salad
description: A quick, winey, aerated salad combining miso-marinated greens, almonds, and Mediterranean flavors for a macrobiotic-friendly snack.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk together miso paste, coconut oil, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, and smoked paprika until smooth.
Toss mixed greens, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, and almonds in the bowl with the miso dressing until evenly coated.
Transfer salad to a serving platter or bowl.
Drizzle a small amount of extra olive oil over the top for extra shine.
Sprinkle a pinch of sea salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
Let the salad rest for 2 minutes to allow flavors to mingle.
Serve immediately with a splash of red wine or sparkling water.
Garnish with a few whole almonds for crunch if desired.
Enjoy a quick, winey, aerated Moroccan-inspired salad.
